hero.title: ಎಲ್ಲರಿಗೂ AI-ಚಾಲಿತ ಆರೋಗ್ಯ ಸೇವೆ
hero.subtitle: ಮುಂದಿನ ಪೀಳಿಗೆಯ ರೋಗ ಪತ್ತೆ ಮತ್ತು ಆರೋಗ್ಯ ನಿರ್ವಹಣೆ

home.title: Universal AI Medical Diagnostics
home.hero_subtitle: A unified AI suite for clinical-grade vision and vocal biomarkers.
home.features_title: Everything You Need for Complete Healthcare
home.features_subtitle: From AI-powered diagnostics to telemedicine consultations, Netra AI provides a comprehensive healthcare ecosystem.

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.subtitle: Get anemia screening results in three simple steps with our AI-powered detection system.
how_it_works.step1_desc: Take a photo of the conjunctiva (inner eyelid) and upload it securely to our platform.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Our advanced machine learning model analyzes the image to detect signs of anemia.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Receive accurate results within seconds with confidence scores and recommendations.
how_it_works.step4_desc: Book an instant video consultation with a specialist to discuss your results.

about.title: About Anemia Detection
about.desc1_start: Anemia is a condition where you lack enough healthy red blood cells to carry adequate oxygen to your body's tissues. It affects over
about.desc2: Our AI-powered detection system analyzes the conjunctiva (inner eyelid) to detect signs of anemia quickly and accurately, making early screening accessible to everyone.
about.features_non_invasive_desc: No blood samples required. Simple eye image analysis provides quick screening.
about.features_instant_desc: Get AI-powered analysis in under 5 seconds with high accuracy rates.
about.features_accessible_desc: Available to anyone with a smartphone camera. Healthcare made accessible.
about.features_accuracy_desc: Trained on thousands of images with medical professional validation.
about.testimonial_1: The AI analysis is incredibly fast and accurate. It saved me a trip to the lab and the anxiety of waiting for results.
about.testimonial_2: I use this platform daily. The AI acts as a fantastic second pair of eyes, and the consultation scribe saves me hours of charting.
about.testimonial_3: I was amazed at how simple it was to book a consultation and get my scan results. The interface is beautiful and so easy to use.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions? Our team is here to help.
contact.emergency_desc: For urgent medical concerns, please contact your healthcare provider or emergency services immediately.
contact.emergency_note: This AI screening tool is not a substitute for professional medical advice.

ai_models.dr_desc: Automated DR screening and severity grading
ai_models.cataract_desc: Early cataract identification from eye images
ai_models.parkinsons_desc: Voice tremor analysis for Parkinson's screening

home.feature1_desc: Advanced conjunctiva analysis using AI to detect pallor â€” a key indicator of anemia
home.feature2_desc: 24/7 conversational AI for symptom guidance and health questions
home.feature3_desc: Real-time chat with read receipts, file sharing, and emoji reactions
home.feature4_desc: Connect with certified hematologists and specialists for professional care
home.feature5_desc: Gamified health tracking â€“ earn badges and XP for staying healthy
home.feature6_desc: Invite friends and family, earn rewards for every successful referral
home.feature7_desc: Automatically generate structured SOAP notes from doctor consultations
home.feature8_desc: AI-assisted video calls with automated note-taking and summaries
home.feature9_desc: Break language barriers â€” speak your language, doctor hears theirs
home.feature10_desc: Book consultations with preset time slots that fit your schedule
home.feature11_desc: Find physical consultation centers and diagnostic labs near you
home.feature12_desc: Unified health history â€” past scans, prescriptions, and consultation summaries
home.feature13_desc: End-to-end encrypted platform with full data privacy compliance

footer.description: AI-powered anemia detection through eye scan analysis. Connecting patients with doctors through smart, multilingual consultations.

acceptance.title: ಪ್ರಾಯೋಜಿತ ಶರತ್ಕಾಲ
acceptance.content: By accessing and using Netra AI healthcare platform, you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.

services.title: ಸೇವೆಗಳ ವಿವರ
services.content: Netra AI provides AI-powered healthcare screening, telemedicine consultations, health monitoring, and related services. Our platform is designed to assist healthcare professionals and patients but does not replace professional medical advice.

medical_disclaimer.title: ಔಷಧೀಯ ವಿನಂತಿ |
medical_disclaimer.content: Netra AI is not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always seek the advice of your physician or qualified health provider with any questions regarding a medical condition. Never disregard professional medical advice or delay seeking it because of information provided by Netra AI.

user_responsibilities.title: ಬಳಕೆದಾರ ಜವಾಬ್ದಾರಿಗಳು
user_responsibilities.content: Users must provide accurate information, maintain account security, use services lawfully, respect intellectual property rights, and not misuse or attempt to compromise the platform.

liability.title: ವ್ಯಾಜ್ಯದ ಸರಿಹಿಡಿತ
liability.content: Netra AI and its affiliates shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use or inability to use the service.

privacy.title: Privacy & Data Protection
privacy.content: We are committed to protecting your privacy and comply with HIPAA regulations. Your health information is encrypted and securely stored. See our Privacy Policy for details.

termination.title: ಖಾತೆ ನಿಲ್ಲಿಸುವಿಕೆ
termination.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms. Users may close their accounts at any time through account settings.

changes.title: ಪರಿಣಾಮವನ್ನು ಪದಗಳಿಲ್ಲಿ
changes.content: We may update these terms periodically. Continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms. We will notify users of significant changes.

governing_law.title: ಆಡಳಿತ ಕಾನೂನು
governing_law.content: These terms are governed by the laws of India. Any disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Bangalore, Karnataka.

contact.title: ಕಾನ್ಟಾಕ್ಟ್ ಇನ್‌ಫರ್ಮೇಷನ್
contact.content: For questions about these terms, contact us at legal@netra-ai.com or through our contact page.

terms.acceptance_notice: ನೆಟ್ರಾ ಎಯಿ ಅನ್ನು ಬಳಸುವ ಮೂಲಕ, ಇದರಲ್ಲಿ ನಿಮಗೆ ಪಾಠವನ್ನು ಓದಿದ್ದರು, ಅವರನ್ನು ತಫಾಸೀಯವಾಗಿ ಪರಿಣಾಮವನ್ನು ಒಳಗೊಂಡಿದೆ.

faq.title: ಹೆಚ್ಚಿನ ಪ್ರಶ್ನೆಗಳು
faq.subtitle: ನೆಟ್ರಾ ಎಐ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಸಾಮಾನ್ಯ ಪ್ರಶ್ನೆಗಳಿಗೆ ಉತ್ತರ
faq.no_results: ಕೇಳಿಸಿಕೊಂಡ ಯೋಚನೆಗಳು ಕಂಡಿಲ್ಲ. ಪ್ರಶ್ನಾ ಅಥವಾ ವರ್ಗವನ್ನು ತಿರುಗಿಸಿ, ಕೆಳಗೆ ಪ್ರಯತ್ನಿಸಿ.

general.a1: Netra AI is an AI-powered healthcare platform that provides disease screening, telemedicine consultations, health monitoring, and personalized health insights. We combine advanced AI technology with professional medical expertise.
general.a2: Netra AI is available for patients seeking healthcare services, doctors providing consultations, and healthcare administrators managing facilities. Each user type has a dedicated portal with specific features.
general.q3: ನೆಟ್ರಾ ಎಯ್ ಅವು ತುಂಬಕ್ ಭಾಷೆಗೆ ದೊರೆಯುತ್ತದೆ?
general.a3: Yes! Netra AI supports 6 languages: English, Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada, and Marathi. You can switch languages anytime from the language selector.

medical.a1: Netra AI can screen for anemia, cataracts, diabetic retinopathy, Parkinson's disease (voice analysis), and mental health conditions. We continuously add new screening capabilities.
medical.a2: Our AI models achieve 85-95% accuracy and are trained on large medical datasets. However, AI screening is not a replacement for professional medical diagnosis. All results should be reviewed by qualified healthcare professionals.
medical.q3: ಹೇಳುವ ನಿರ್ದಿಷ್ಟ ನಕ್ಕಾಣ ಯೋಜನೆಗಳಿಂದ ಬದಲಾಗಿಸಲು ಸುರಕ್ಷತೆ ಮತ್ತು ಅಪರಾಧವನ್ನು ಎಚ್ಚರಿಸುವ ಬದಲಾಗಿಸುವ ಕಮ್ಯೂನಿಟಿ ಪ್ರಣಾಳಿಕೆ
medical.a3: Absolutely! Netra AI connects you with licensed doctors for video consultations. You can book appointments, share your AI screening results, and receive professional medical advice.
medical.q4: ನೋಂದಾಯಿಸುವ ಬೆಂಬಲ ಪಡೆಯಲು ಎಲ್ಲಾ ಪ್ರಕ್ರಿಯೆಗಳನ್ನು ಅನುಸರಿಸಬೇಕು
medical.a4: Navigate to the Doctors page, browse available doctors by specialty, select a doctor, choose an available time slot, and confirm your booking. You'll receive a confirmation and reminder.

security.a1: Yes. We use AES-256 encryption for data at rest and TLS 1.3 for data in transit. We are HIPAA compliant and follow strict data protection regulations. Your data is never shared without your explicit consent.
security.a2: Only you and healthcare professionals you explicitly authorize can access your medical records. All access is logged and auditable. You can revoke access at any time.
security.a3: Never. We do not sell, rent, or share your personal health information with third parties for marketing purposes. Your privacy is our top priority.

billing.a1: Basic AI screening features are free for patients. Doctor consultations have consultation fees set by individual doctors. Premium features and enterprise plans are available for healthcare facilities.
billing.a2: We accept credit/debit cards, UPI, net banking, and digital wallets. All payments are processed securely through encrypted payment gateways.
billing.a3: Refunds are available if you cancel an appointment at least 24 hours in advance. For other refund requests, please contact our support team.

technical.a1: Netra AI works on desktop computers, laptops, tablets, and smartphones. We support Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge browsers. Our platform is also available as a Progressive Web App (PWA).
technical.a2: No installation required! Netra AI is a web-based platform accessible through your browser. You can optionally install it as a PWA for offline access and app-like experience.
technical.a3: Contact our support team through the Help Center, email support@netra-ai.com, or use the in-app chat. We provide 24/7 technical support.
technical.a4: Some features work offline if you install the PWA. Your data syncs automatically when you reconnect to the internet.

services.title: ನಮ್ಮ ಸೇವೆಗಳು
services.subtitle: ಸಂಪೂರ್ಣ ಆಯುಷ್ಯ ಶಕ್ತಿ ಆಧಾರಿತ ಆರೋಗ್ಯಕ್ರಮಗಳು: ಅತ್ಯಂತ ದೀರ್ಘವಾಸಿತ್ವ ನಿರೀಕ್ಷೆ, ಟೆಲಿಮೆಡಿಸಿನ್, ಆರೋಗ್ಯ ನಿರೀಕ್ಷಿತವಾದ ಅವಧಿ

anemia.title: ನಾಡಿ ತುಂಬುವಿಕೆ ನಿರೀಕ್ಷೆ
anemia.desc: AI-powered anemia screening using conjunctiva analysis. Non-invasive, instant results with 90%+ accuracy.

cataract.title: ಕತ್ರಾಕ್ಟ್ ವಿಚಾರಣೆ
cataract.desc: Early detection of cataracts through eye image analysis. Helps prevent vision loss with timely intervention.

retinopathy.title: ರೆಟಿನಾ ಸಂಬಂಧಿತ ಡಯಾಬೀಟಿಸ್
retinopathy.desc: ಉತ್ತಮ ನೆರಂಜು ಚಿತ್ರ ವಿಶ್ಲೇಷಣೆ ಕಾರ್ಯಕ್ರಮ ಸೋಂಕದ ರೋಗಿಗಳಿಗಾಗಿ. ಅತ್ಯಂತ ಹಳೆಯ ನಿಖಾಯಿತಿ ಮುಂದುವರಲು ಕಾಪಾಡುತ್ತದೆ.
retinopathy.f1:
ಕೊಂಕಣ ಸಾಮರ್ಥ್ಯ 2023-12-01

ಗುಂಪು ಆಚರಣೆಗಳನ್ನು ಹೊರತುಪಡಿಸಿ, ಕಾಲಮ್-ಇವೆಂಟ್ ದೃಶ್ಯಗಳನ್ನು ಕಳದೆಯಾಗಬಹುದು

parkinsons.title: ಪಾರ್ಕಿನ್ಸನ್ ವಯಲಿ ವಿಶ್ಲೇಷಣೆ
parkinsons.desc: Voice-based screening for Parkinson's disease. Detects early motor symptoms through speech patterns.

mental_health.title: ಮಾನಸಿಕ ಆರೋಗ್ಯ ಶೀಖಣವಾಗಿ
mental_health.desc: ವೈಜ್ಞಾನಿಕ ಮತ್ತು ಭಾವೋದ್ವೇಗಾತ್ಮಕ ಅಂಚನಾದೊಂದಿಗೆ ಪರಿಣಾಮಿ ಮಾನಸಿಕ ಆರೋಗ್ಯ ಮೂಲಧಾರೆ ಬಳಸಲಾಗುತ್ತದೆ.

chatbot.title: ಎಐ ಆರೋಗ್ಯ ಸಹಾಯಕ
chatbot.desc: 24/7 ಆಯ್ವೀಕೃತ ಸ್ವಾಸ್ಥ್ಯ ಚಾಟ್‌ಬಾಟ್ ಮತ್ತು ಅಂತ್ಯ ಜೀವನ, ಆರೋಗ್ಯ ಸಲಹೆಗಳು ಮತ್ತು ಶ್ರೇಯ, ಉಚಿತಾಂಕಿತ ಸಂಭಾಷಣೆ

telemedicine.title: ಟೆಲೀಮೆಡಿಸಿನ್ ಸಲಹೆಗಳು
telemedicine.desc: ಲೈಸೆನ್ಸ್ ಪಡೆದ ವೈದ್ಯರೊಂದಿಗೆ ವೀಡಿಯೋ ಕಾಳ್ಹಿಕಗಳ ಮೂಲಕ ಸಂಪರ್ಕ ಸಾಧಿಸಿ. ಇಲ್ಲಿ ನೈಋತ್ಯ ವೈದ್ಯಕೀಯ ಸಲಹೆಗಳನ್ನು ಪಡೆಯಬಹುದು.

emergency.title: ಅಪಾಯ ಸೇವೆಗಳು
emergency.desc: ಸ್ನೇಹಿತರಿಗೆ ನಮ್ಮ ಸಂಬಂಧದ ಪರವಾಯಿಸಿ, ಕೆಲವು ಜನರಿಗೆ ಸೇವೆಯನ್ನು ನೀಡಲು.

monitoring.title: ಆರೋಗ್ಯ ನಿವಾಣಕ್ಕೆ
monitoring.desc: Track vital signs, medications, chronic conditions, and health trends over time.

cta.title: ಪ್ರಾರಂಭಿಸುವ ಸಕ್ರಮತೆ
cta.subtitle: ನೆಟ್ರಾ ಎಯಿ ಅವರ ಆರೋಗ್ಯ ಸೌಲಭ್ಯಗಳಿಗಾಗಿ ಆದರೇಣುಷ್ಠ ಹಲವಾರು ಬಳಕೆದಾರರನ್ನು ಸಮುಚ್ಛಯಿಸುತ್ತಾರೆ

pricing.title: ಸೌಲಭ್ಯ, ಹರ್ಪಾಗವನ್ನು ಕಚ್ಚಾ, ದೊಡ್ಡ ತೆರಿಗೆ
pricing.subtitle: ತುಂಬ ನಿರ್ದೇಶಕಾತ್ಮಕ ಆಯ್‌ಎಫ್ ಸ್ಕೀನಿಂಗ್ ವಿಧಾನಗಳನ್ನು ಒಳಗೊಂಡಿರುವ ಎಲ್ಲಾ ಯೋಜನೆಗಳನ್ನು ಎಂಚುಕೆ.
